flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Washington State University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (24.0k → 21.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Washington State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Washington State University rose 23% between 2006 and 2009 (32.5% → 40.2%).
